targetInvestors: Protocol participants, token holders, governance participants, and market participants

metadata.classificationNote: CFG is a protocol governance and utility token for the Centrifuge ecosystem. It is not a direct tokenized fund share, loan note, senior tranche, or reserve-backed instrument.
metadata.governanceNote: Official docs state that active DAO governance is currently paused and that responsibility for stewarding the protocol has shifted to the Centrifuge Network Foundation during the post-launch phase.
metadata.tokenContractStatus: Official docs identify V3 CFG as an Ethereum-native ERC-20 token after migration.
